{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c8e2ef3e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Dispersion diagram: passbands of a multicell cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "A cavity with *N* coupled cells does not have one mode per band — it has *N*, one for each **per-cell phase advance** from the 0-mode to the $\\pi$-mode. Plotting frequency against phase advance gives the **Brillouin (dispersion) diagram**: each polarisation forms a passband, and the accelerating $\\pi$-mode sits at the top of the fundamental monopole band.\n",
    "\n",
    "`cav.plot_dispersion()` builds this from a solved eigenmode run — overlaying every computed polarisation, grouping modes into passbands, and (for the monopole) drawing the folded speed-of-light line the accelerating mode sits on."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "13b923a0",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T17:17:21.571809Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T17:17:21.571642Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.293226Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.292593Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from cavsim2d import Study, EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0cf97682",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. A 9-cell TESLA cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "Nine coupled cells → nine modes per passband. We build it inside a `Study` and keep beampipes on both ends."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "9e025e31",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.295508Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.295216Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.325389Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.324696Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "midcell   = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.652, 103.3536]   # A, B, a, b, Ri, L, Req\n",
    "endcell_l = [40.34, 40.34, 10, 13.5, 39, 55.7251, 103.3536]\n",
    "endcell_r = [42, 42, 9, 12.8, 39, 56.8407, 103.3536]\n",
    "cavs = Study('dispersion_demo')\n",
    "cav = EllipticalCavity(9, midcell, endcell_l, endcell_r, beampipe='both', name='tesla')\n",
    "cavs.add_cavity([cav], ['TESLA'])"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1e385c98",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. Solve the monopole and dipole passbands\n",
    "\n",
    "We ask for both the **monopole** (accelerating) and **dipole** (deflecting, HOM) polarisations, and enough modes to fill each fundamental passband (9 cells → 9 modes, plus a couple into the next band)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "fe8c9c77",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.327652Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T17:17:23.327497Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T17:17:46.944064Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T17:17:46.943138Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "cavs.run_eigenmode({\n",
    "    'n_cells': 9,\n",
    "    'polarisation': ['monopole', 'dipole'],\n",
    "    'n_modes': 12,\n",
    "    'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "})"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5038eb77",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. The dispersion diagram\n",
    "\n",
    "By default every solved polarisation is overlaid, coloured by polarisation, with the monopole's folded light line. The accelerating $\\pi$-mode is the highest point of the fundamental monopole band, ~on the light line."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "b09df3b5",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T17:17:46.946026Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T17:17:46.945856Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.198310Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.197582Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: >"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 700x600 with 3 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.plot_dispersion()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cad5a419",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. Just the accelerating passband\n",
    "\n",
    "Select a single polarisation and passband. `bands` is 1-based; passband 1 is the fundamental."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "7467c4b6",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.200400Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.200213Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.218489Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.217931Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='phase advance per cell', ylabel='$f$ [MHz]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.plot_dispersion(pol='monopole', bands=[1])"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cdefd6e2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 5. The spectrum as a comb\n",
    "\n",
    "The same modes as a spectral comb — vertical lines at each eigenfrequency, coloured by polarisation, with a marker at each passband's cluster mean."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "612e5298",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.220178Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.220025Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.369026Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T17:17:47.368490Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [

      ]

     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: title={'center': 'Eigenfrequency spectrum — TESLA'}, xlabel='frequency [MHz]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 6,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.eigenmode.plot_spectrum(bands=True)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e81baffa",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
